assets: ability to build simple software without cash outlay
distribution: must rely on marketplace or search distribution
unfair_advantages: can prototype cheaply with AI tools

opportunities.title: Review-mined marketplace micro-tool
opportunities.thesis: Mine reviews in an existing marketplace for repeated pain, then ship the narrowest self-serve fix so buyer intent comes from the platform rather than from outbound sales.
opportunities.why_user_can_win: This partially offsets the lack of audience and sales willingness by borrowing distribution from a marketplace. The user's coding ability is enough for a narrow wedge, but the edge remains weak.
validation_plan: Choose one marketplace with built-in search intent
Collect and cluster 30-100 negative reviews from competing tools
Pick a pain point repeated at least five times
Publish a one-sentence landing page and draft listing
Proceed only if there is evidence of discoverability or prepay interest
kill_criteria: no repeated review complaint with clear buying intent
MVP requires more than 6-10 build hours
tool requires active outreach to get first users
no installs, waitlist signups, or prepays after listing goes live

opportunities.title: Tiny async B2B utility with self-serve checkout
opportunities.thesis: Build a single-purpose AI utility for one repetitive office task and try to sell it directly at a low monthly price without onboarding calls.
opportunities.why_user_can_win: The user can build the product cheaply, but has no distribution, niche access, or domain authority, so the path is weak.
validation_plan: test price sensitivity with self-serve checkout
abandon if no traffic source exists
kill_criteria: no credible acquisition path without outreach or content
feature set grows beyond one simple job

opportunities.title: Programmatic SEO or content-led AI tool
opportunities.thesis: Use content to attract users into a narrow AI product.
opportunities.why_user_can_win: The user cannot win here because the model depends on a behavior they explicitly refuse to do.

next_actions: Reset the month-one target from $3000 MRR to proof of demand
Choose one marketplace: Chrome, Shopify, or Google Workspace
Mine 50-100 competitor reviews for repeated complaints
Select one wedge that fits a 6-10 hour MVP
Publish a landing page and listing draft before building the full product
Kill the idea fast if there is no discoverability or prepay signal

feasibility_assessment.requested_goal: $3000 MRR from an AI micro-SaaS in 30 days
feasibility_assessment.assessment: not realistic under the stated constraints
feasibility_assessment.reason: The user lacks founder edge, distribution, time, and allowed acquisition channels. Generic AI micro-SaaS ideas are easy to copy, and the constraints remove the usual paths to fast validation and revenue.
feasibility_assessment.revised_goal: 3-10 paying users or one credible acquisition channel within 30 days
